title: Changing start and end date for timeline

posts.author: Bart (Bart Schoonaert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Can someone tell me how I can limit start- and end-date on the timeline displayed in the “timeline” view? I would like to limit this to 1 year but it keeps displaying multiple years…
Would also be usefull if you’re able to set limits on this for printing purposes.
Thanks.
Rgds,
Bart
